pre_schedule.description: Whether to create a pre-scheduled meeting.

start_time.description: Meeting start time. Only used for scheduled meetings (type 2) and recurring meetings with a fixed time (type 8). Use UTC format such as 2023-11-25T12:00:00Z.

duration.description: Meeting duration in minutes. Used for scheduled meetings only.

schedule_for.description: Email address or user ID to schedule the meeting on behalf of.

timezone.description: Timezone to format start_time (e.g., America/Los_Angeles). If not provided, defaults to the meeting host's timezone.

password.description: Meeting passcode. May only contain the following characters: a-z A-Z 0-9 @ - _ *. Maximum 10 characters.

default_password.description: Use the default passcode set in account settings.
